title: carex rigida subsp. limula
intro: Carex rigida subsp. limula, also known as the rigid sedge or rough sedge, is a subspecies of Carex rigida, a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Carex rigida subsp. limula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
